raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet winnu Pestitajs irr
ſtiprs/ KUNGS Zebaot irr win-
na Wahrds/ wiꞥſch teesadams
teesabs winno Leetu/ ka wiꞥſch
cho Semmi darra Duffain/ bet
Babeles Eedſihwotajus Dreb-
bam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Sohbins buhs pahr
teem Kaldeereem/ fakla tas
KUNGS/ un pahr teem Ge-
dſihwotajcem no Babeles/ un
pahr winnas Leeleem-Rungeem/
un pahr winnas Gudreem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Sohbins nah̄s pahr
winno Leeſitajeem/ ka tee par
Gekkeem tohp/ Sohbins pahr
winnu Warreneem/ ka tee bai-
lojah̄s.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sohbins pahr winnas
Sirgeem/un pahr winnas Rat-
teem/ un pahr wiſſu faſkrehu-
ſcho Lauschu Pulku/ kas win-
nas Widdû irraid/ ka tee ka
Seewas tohp/ Sohbins pahr
winnas Mantahm/ ka tah̄s tohp
laupitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Buls nah̄s pahr win-
nas Uhdenim/ ka tee iſſikt/ jo ta
irr eltadeewiga Semne/ un
trakko ar farveem Deeweſkteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz dſihwohs tur Ji-
jim un Ojim/ ir jannt Stransi
dſihwohs eekſch tah̄s/ un tur ne
buhs Mahjas-Weetu wairs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Itt ka Deews Sodomu
un Gomorrn/ un winnu Raini-
nus irr apgahsis/ fakka tas
KUNGS: Ta ne dſihwohs tur
netweens/ un netweens Zilweka
Behrus tur mittihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ weena Tanta
nah̄k no Seemeſa-Puffes/ wee-
na leela Tauta/ un daufs Keh-
nini zeltees no tah̄s Semmes
Mallahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee weddihs Stohpus
un Schlehpus/ bahrgi irr tee/
un ne buhs schehligi/ winnu
Balſine kauks ka Juha/ un tee
jah̄s us Sirgeem apbrunnott/
ka Karra-Wihri prett tewis/ ak
Babeles Meita!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas Kehniisch no Babe-
les dſirdehs winno Slawu/ un
winna Rohkas nogurs/ Behdas
winnu jagrabbs/ Sahpes ka
kahdu Seewu/ kas dsemde.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redsi/ wiꞥſch nah̄s aug-
scham ka Lauwa no ta uspluh-
duscha Jardana/ prett teem ſtip-
reem Dſihwokteem/ jo es liſſchu
winnu no turrenes peepekchi tez-
zeit/ un (fo finn) kahds Jan-
ekliis tas irr/ ko es prett tewim
eezeſſchu? Jo kas irr ta ka es? un
kas weddihs manni Teeta? un
ekſch irr tas Gans/ kas manna
Breekſcha stahwehs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 45,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz klaufajt ta KUN-
GA Padohnu/ ko wiꞥſch pahr
Babeli irr ſadohmajs/ un winna
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
